findings.summary: Stale artifact file from prior run confused project identification — header said 'genomics' but sessions were from meta dir
findings.evidence: head -3 output showed 'genomics' header from earlier run; session IDs confirmed meta
findings.proposed_fix: suggest-skill: check for stale output files before overwriting, or use timestamped filenames

findings.summary: Tool extraction regex in suggest-skill SKILL.md doesn't match actual transcript format from extract_transcript.py
findings.evidence: re.findall with 'Tool|tool_use' pattern returned 0 matches; actual format is **TOOLS:** `ToolName(args)`
findings.proposed_fix: Update suggest-skill SKILL.md Step 2 regex to match actual transcript format

findings.summary: n-gram analysis on tool names alone produces only generic sequences (Bash->Bash 400x); no actionable signal without argument context
findings.evidence: Top 15 3-grams were all homogeneous tool repeats
findings.proposed_fix: Extract tool+arg pairs from start, or skip n-gram step and go directly to Gemini semantic analysis
